summary: Frontend-only regression for iter40 mega-approve per-row Approve link + category pill. All 5 frontend scenarios verified against 1119 LLC (187 vendors, 864 AI-ready rows). Per-row Approve link renders, click optimistically removes row and updates summary (864→840→818), fresh Undo toast (data-testid='mega-undo-toast') appears each click showing 'Approved N rows / You have 60 seconds to undo', successive approves surface last-write-wins toasts. Backend POST /transactions/bulk-approve-ai-ready with contact_ids:[single] returns batch_id + updated count correctly. Checkbox toggle and vendor-name toggle do NOT trigger approve (no event bubbling). Category pill DOM verified: classes exactly 'shrink-0 inline-flex items-center px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-full bg-white border border-slate-200 text-slate-700 text-[10px] font-mono-num' with text '6000 · Meals'-style. Restored all 3 test batches via undo-mega-batch endpoint (24+22+20=66 rows reverted, status 200).
critical_code_review_comments: approveOne() in CleanupCopilot.jsx correctly implements optimistic UI: subtracts total_rows/total_contacts/total_amount and filters vendor from list before POST; rolls back with vendor prepended on failure and fires error toast — code path is correct and matches spec.

The three buttons (checkbox, name-toggle, Approve link) are siblings without nested onClick handlers, so no event bubbling — verified by clicking checkbox and confirming row stays and Approve is not fired.

Note: I was unable to fully exercise the 500-rollback branch in the live UI via page.route interception (route handler did not fire on the axios call because of URL/method matching). Static code review confirms the catch-block restores vendor, count, and shows an error toast; recommend a follow-up unit test if higher assurance is needed.
seed_data_creation: None. All 3 test batches (52d005ec…, ecc5d0a9…, 1e926a72…) were reverted via /api/companies/{cid}/transactions/undo-mega-batch/{batch_id} — each returned {ok:true, reverted:24/22/20}. Total 66 rows restored to their pre-test AI-ready state.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Per-row Approve link in mega-approve modal works end-to-end. Undo endpoint verified live. All rows restored after testing.
